response.overview: Asad and Moushumi meet while hunting in the tea garden and fall in love. Moushumi's uncle wants her to marry his son Sikander to have all her property. Moushumi marries Asad, but Asad has an car accident that day and leaves the country with his father for better treatment. Moushumi's uncle demands that she marry Sikander. She somehow manages to escape from home and goes to Asad's house, where his mother insults her. Returning to the country, Asad is disappointed that Moushumi escaped from her uncle's house. Meanwhile, Moushumi discovers that Asad is engaged to her friend Nazma. Can Asad and Moushumi return to each other.
response.title: Osru Diye Lekha
